info.title: SynapseGit localhost application API
info.description: Single-user, loopback-only application contract. Read routes, creator import, same-process Human review, read-only creator-session diagnostics, and confirmed bounded fsck with process-local operation polling are implemented in current source; the tagged v0.2.0 binary does not include the diagnostics or browser fsck additions. Archive list, export, and restore operations remain planned. This is not the public Core protocol.

servers.description: The exact loopback origin printed by the local process

get.summary: Check the local process without opening a repository
List the exact server-owned project catalog
Read project and projection status from one Ref snapshot

200.description: Current project status; this does not run fsck implicitly

get.summary: List current Refs from one consistent snapshot
List a bounded page of committed Ref transitions

parameters.name: ref_name
parameters.description: Exact Ref name; omission selects the project reflog

schema.description: 1 to 500 UTF-8 bytes after query decoding

get.summary: Discover complete, pending, and incomplete creator sessions

200.description: Sessions derived from one Ref snapshot and same-process pending state

post.summary: Stream three files and publish a proposal for later Human review
post.description: The AI output is caller-supplied. The request cannot select Refs, heads, OIDs, authority, profiles, or permits.

201.description: Proposal published and same-process review state retained

get.summary: Read a current creator report or explicit pending/incomplete state

200.description: Session state bound to the returned Ref snapshot

get.summary: Read one trusted-session-resolved image Blob, never an arbitrary OID
get.description: Complete sessions resolve roles through a validated current creator report. A same-process pending session resolves roles through its retained receipt after Ref/reachability rechecks; missing pending authority is incomplete. Every response is rejected with resource_limit before body streaming when the verified Blob exceeds 64 MiB. Allowed raster signatures may be returned with an exact image type and nosniff. Unknown bytes and SVG are attachment-only octet streams.

200.description: Verified Blob bytes resolved from the current creator session

post.summary: Publish adopt, reject, or defer through the admitted Human route
post.description: The review ID names same-process server state. No application handle, permit, Ref, head, OID, or candidate is accepted from the client.

200.description: Human decision published; returns the rebuilt report or the durable committed receipt when report reconstruction is unavailable

get.summary: Diagnose a creator session without resume, cleanup, or mutation

post.summary: Start an explicitly confirmed repository fsck job

202.description: The operation was validated and queued

post.summary: Start a no-replace directory archive export job

202.description: The operation was validated and queued

post.summary: Start a restore into a configured empty target project

202.description: The operation was validated and queued

get.summary: List Core-inspected logical archives under the server-owned root

200.description: Logical archive summaries without filesystem paths
Current operation state and final result when known

localSessionToken.name: X-Synapse-Local-Token
localSessionToken.description: High-entropy process-local browser request token. It is not user authentication.

Problem.description: A safe structured error; internal paths and capability values are omitted

DecimalInteger.description: Canonical decimal rendering of a server-side i64

EventId.description: Canonical non-negative decimal SQLite event identifier

BeginCreatorSessionRequest.description: Exactly three raw binary file parts; each file is at most 64 MiB and their aggregate is at most 192 MiB.

original_image.description: Raw, unencoded binary; maxLength counts octets under OpenAPI 3.1

current_image.description: Raw, unencoded binary; maxLength counts octets under OpenAPI 3.1

ai_output.description: Raw, unencoded binary; maxLength counts octets under OpenAPI 3.1

rationale.description: At most 5000 UTF-8 bytes when present

proposal_attributed_to_agent.description: Agent EntityId, matching the existing creator report contract

reviewed_by_human.description: Human creator EntityId, matching the existing creator report contract

rationale.description: At most 5000 UTF-8 bytes when present
